DeviceDescription.Name: YOUR DEVICE NAME
DeviceDescription.IntendedUse: Replace with the intended use statement from your prior PSUR. Example: The [Device Name] is intended to [function] during [procedure type]. It is intended for use by [user type] in [use environment].
DeviceDescription.DeviceType: Replace with device type (e.g., 'Implantable', 'Non-patient contacting', 'Reusable surgical instrument')
DeviceDescription.PhysicalDescription: Replace with a brief physical description of the device
DeviceDescription.Accessories: Replace with description of accessories or 'None'

AssociatedDocuments.Title: Post-Market Surveillance Plan for [Your Device Product Family]
Clinical Evaluation Report for [Your Device Name]

SectionB_SummaryOfCommercialUse.Usage: Replace with a description of how the device is used clinically

SectionC_CustomerFeedback.Conclusion: Replace with the customer feedback conclusion from the prior PSUR

TrendAnalysis.Observation: Replace with trend observation from prior PSUR

SectionE_ComplaintTrending.Conclusion: Replace with complaint trending conclusion from prior PSUR

Events: Replace with description of each adverse event from prior period, or remove array entries if none

SectionH_ClinicalLiterature.Findings: Replace with clinical literature review findings from prior PSUR

Results.MHRA: Replace with MHRA search results or 'None'
Results.FDA_MAUDE: Replace with FDA MAUDE search results or 'None'
Results.SARA_DAEN: Replace with SARA/DAEN search results or 'None'

SectionJ_ProductionFeedback.NCMRs: Replace with NCMR summary or 'None identified'
SectionJ_ProductionFeedback.Trends: Replace with production trend summary or 'None identified'

SectionK_CAPA.NewCAPAs: Replace with CAPA summary or 'None initiated during surveillance period'

Rationale: Replace with rationale for PMCF decision
Add additional rationale points as needed

SectionM_BenefitRiskAssessment.Conclusion: Replace with benefit-risk conclusion from prior PSUR

SectionN_Conclusion.OverallConclusion: Replace with overall conclusion from prior PSUR
